phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove inizia la scalinata Lardana, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-veh in-EE-tsa la ska-lee-NA-ta lar-DA-na, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: In fondo alla piattaforma, a sinistra.
likely_response.pronunciation: EEN FOHN-doh AHL-lah pee-aht-tah-FOHR-mah AH see-NEE-strah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the platform, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the platform, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EEN FOHN-doh AHL-lah pee-aht-tah-FOHR-mah AH see-NEE-strah
responses.local: In fondo alla piattaforma, a sinistra.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ufficio informazioni turistiche, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH loo-FEE-chee-oh in-for-ma-TSYO-nee too-REE-stee-keh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: In the square, near the church.

responses.english: In the square, near the church.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora chiude l'ultimo treno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOOzee, ah kay Orah KYOOdeh loolTEEmo TREHno, pehr fahVOreh

likely_response.translation_en: The last one passes around eleven PM.

responses.english: The last one passes around eleven PM.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto del treno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-ta il bee-LYET-toh del TREH-no, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si acquista la Cinque Terre Card, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KO-meh see ah-KWEE-sta la CHEEN-kweh TER-reh card, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Presso le macchinette automatiche in stazione.
likely_response.pronunciation: PREH-ssoh LEH mahkch-ee-NEHT-teh ah-oo-toh-mah-TEECH-eh EEN stah-tsee-OH-neh
likely_response.translation_en: At the automatic machines in the station.

responses.english: At the automatic machines in the station.
responses.phonetic: PREH-ssoh LEH mahkch-ee-NEHT-teh ah-oo-toh-mah-TEECH-eh EEN stah-tsee-OH-neh
responses.local: Presso le macchinette automatiche in stazione.
